I usually try to pick a credit spread 2%+ away from currently price, especially if we open up or down .5% ish. I’ve built a VaR model and GJR-GARCH model as well and am working on my own intraday volatility model based on Alma’s concepts. Obviously I analyze Alma’s posts in the morning and then start looking for strikes well beyond where we’re likely to go. I also look at the implied move for the day. Tomorrow’s is supposed to be 90 points on SPX (1.6%). 

I cut it extremely close today, but that’s essentially what I’ve been doing. Do what you will with it. I may not even play anything tomorrow. I’ve always had an affinity with the Nasdaq more than the S&P, you can do either or. My $0.02
